description: Windows 11 Fluent Design rendering specification and QSS stylesheets for PySide6 applications.

typography.font_family: Segoe UI Variable, Segoe UI, sans-serif
typography.title: 20px
typography.subtitle: 16px
typography.caption: 12px

qss_templates.global_dark: QMainWindow, QWidget { background-color: #202020; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable'; font-size: 14px; } QToolBar { background-color: #2C2C2C; border-bottom: 1px solid #FFFFFF1A; padding: 4px; spacing: 4px; } QToolButton { background-color: transparent; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 10px; color: #FFFFFF; } QToolButton:hover { background-color: #FFFFFF24; } QToolButton:pressed { background-color: #FFFFFF08; } QStatusBar { background-color: #1A1A1A; color: #FFFFFFAA; border-top: 1px solid #FFFFFF1A; } QSplitter::handle { background-color: #FFFFFF1A; width: 2px; } QSplitter::handle:hover { background-color: #0078D4; } QTreeView { background-color: #202020; border: none; outline: none; show-decoration-selected: 1; } QTreeView::item { padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; } QTreeView::item:hover { background-color: #FFFFFF0D; } QTreeView::item:selected { background-color: #0078D430; color: #FFFFFF; } QListView { background-color: #202020; border: none; } QListView::item { border-radius: 8px; } QListView::item:hover { background-color: #FFFFFF18; } QListView::item:selected { background-color: #0078D440; } QScrollBar:vertical { background-color: transparent; width: 8px; border-radius: 4px; } QScrollBar::handle:vertical { background-color: #FFFFFF55; border-radius: 4px; min-height: 24px; } QScrollBar::handle:vertical:hover { background-color: #FFFFFFAA; } QScrollBar::add-line, QScrollBar::sub-line { height: 0px; } QMenu { background-color: #2C2C2C; border: 1px solid #FFFFFF1A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px; } QMenu::item { padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 4px; } QMenu::item:selected { background-color: #FFFFFF18; } QPushButton { background-color: #0078D4; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 14px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #1A90E8; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: #005FA3; } QPushButton.secondary { background-color: #FFFFFF18; color: #FFFFFF; } QPushButton.secondary:hover { background-color: #FFFFFF24; } QProgressBar { background-color: #FFFFFF18; border-radius: 2px; height: 4px; text-align: center; } QProgressBar::chunk { background-color: #0078D4; border-radius: 2px; }
qss_templates.global_light: QMainWindow, QWidget { background-color: #F3F3F3; color: #000000; font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable'; font-size: 14px; } QToolBar { background-color: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #0000001A; } QTreeView::item:selected { background-color: #0078D430; } QListView::item:selected { background-color: #0078D440; }

mica_simulation.note: True Mica requires DWM API (Windows 11). In PySide6, simulate with a semi-transparent QGraphicsBlurEffect on a frozen desktop screenshot as background layer, or use a fixed dark-glass gradient.
mica_simulation.fallback_gradient: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #2C2C2C, stop:1 #1A1A1A)

icon_guidelines.source: Segoe Fluent Icons (font-face) or SVG icons from the Windows 11 icon pack
icon_guidelines.render: QIcon from QPixmap with device-pixel-ratio support for HiDPI
